localizations.title: Covert Operation in Litlle Italy
localizations.hint_3: Follow Tony. He went down this street and arrived at the intersection of Grand Street.
localizations.hint_4: The Triad thugs don't seem interested in talking. You will have to use force.
localizations.hint_15: You need to open Don Salvatore's briefcase to see what's inside.
localizations.hint_22_first: To reach your car, you need to walk 50 steps from your current location.
localizations.hint_22: You are at the Battaglia Club right now, and you have to walk 50 steps to get to the car.
localizations.hint_27_first: You haven't seen any posters indicating the address of Fletch Co., but there is a way to figure out the location.
localizations.hint_27: Thanks to the advertisement posters you see around town, you can locate the addresses for all of the diamond cutters, except for Fletch Co. However, you shouldn't have any problem figuring out where it's located.
localizations.hint_31_first: The newspaper shows where Don Salvatore might have gone.
localizations.hint_31: Don Salvatore is on the top floor of the building under construction. Remember, as you saw in the hotel's elevator (55), the ground floor of a building is Floor 1.
localizations.hint_36: There are several movie theaters in Little Italy. One of the stores you've visited might have the information you're looking for.
localizations.hint_46_first: Tony first went to Stone & Sons, then met with his fence before heading to Fletch Co. He finally went back down the street toward the south. If you want to find him, just trace the same route that he took.
localizations.hint_46: To find it, look at the map and follow the same route Tony used. Pay close attention to the direction of traffic along each street.
localizations.hint_54_first: Throughout your adventure you've been given regular updates regarding the current time.
localizations.hint_54: The newspaper tells you how long each movie is, so coupled with the start times found on the schedule, you can determine which movie will be ending in a few minutes.
localizations.hint_74_first: There is a way for you to prove to this policewoman that you are an FBI agent.
localizations.hint_74: You have your FBI badge. You saw it at the beginning of your adventure.
localizations.hint_96_first: You must contact your FBI colleagues.
localizations.hint_96: Your FBI colleagues say that Vittorio is probably staying at a luxury hotel. The newspaper describes this hotel, which is located next to a museum.
localizations.hint_98_first: You can give him the password hidden within the letter you were given.
localizations.hint_98: The letter related to this meeting (E) is written in a very deliberate manner, particularly regarding the start of each sentence.
localizations.hint_16: If Tony is receiving medical attention, it must be at one of the hospitals in Little Italy.
localizations.hint_48_first: You'll need to get rid of your two assailants simultaneously, all while keeping one hand steady on the steering wheel the entire time.
localizations.hint_48: The passenger-side door is too far for you to reach while driving, but the biker on your left is very close to your own door.
localizations.hint_78_first: To remove the panel, you will need a flat-head screwdriver and a wrench.
localizations.hint_78: If you position the flat-head screwdriver and the wrench correctly, you will eventually see a number.
localizations.hint_87_first: Although the runaway seems confident, two important clues in his statement reveal the location of the container you are looking for, which has been boxed away from the light since the beginning of the adventure.
localizations.hint_87: The runaway's statements are somewhat strange, as he states "the container is… boxed away from the light…". This is an important clue.
localizations.hint_19_first: You must short out the circuits by connecting the red wires somehow. You can use the blue wiring you found to short out the bare blue wires.
localizations.hint_19: You can use the blue wiring to short out the circuits of the bomb's blue wires, but you'll need another metal object to connect the red wires together and short them out as well.
localizations.hint_83: The man has too much of a lead for you to catch up, but you may be able to stop him by throwing something at him.
localizations.hint_45: Although the harbor is closed to the public, you have a way to let you gain access legally.
localizations.hint_37: The delivery schedule for each Stone & Sons deliveryman hides the actual name of the person who delivered the fake diamonds yesterday at noon.
localizations.hint_29_first: Vittorio wants to take Don Salvatore's place. You need to find Don Salvatore before something bad happens to him.
localizations.hint_29: According to the newspaper, Don Salvatore is at the construction site in Little Italy.
localizations.hint_55_first: The conversation you overheard and the key panel at the front desk will help you find Vittorio's room.
localizations.hint_55: Vittorio's room is on a floor where the luxury room (with golden handles) is not next to the elevator, but also has another room across the hall. Once you've found the correct floor, all you need to do is determine which room is neither empty, nor occupied by another guest.
localizations.hint_86_first: Use the Authentic Diamond Characteristics sheet to identify which diamond cutter provided the fake diamonds, then pay them a visit.
localizations.hint_86: You've seen an advertisement poster that will help you find the location of the diamond cutter you are looking for. Once you know the location, you can get there by car.
localizations.hint_33_first: The informant (99) gave you an important message regarding New York's wins against Boston.
localizations.hint_33: The game scores between New York and Boston are reported in the newspaper.
localizations.hint_machine_34_part1_first: The number for the secure line changes daily, but there must be something you can use to find what today's number is.
localizations.hint_machine_34_part1: The FBI has left a clue in the newspaper, allowing one to find the correct phone number.
localizations.hint_machine_34_part2: There are letters engraved on the phone keys.
localizations.answer_hint_3: If Tony has gone down toward Grand St., that means he walked south along Lafayette St. until he reached the intersection with Grand St. Press the dedicated Car button and proceed to the intersection of Lafayette St. and Grand St.
localizations.answer_hint_4: The Triad thugs mean to do you harm. Your baseball bat can be useful in defending yourself. 12 + 4 = 16
localizations.answer_hint_15: Use the key you found in Vittorio's room to open Don Salvatore's briefcase. 15+63=78
localizations.answer_hint_22: If the car is 50 steps away, add 50 to your current location (22).
localizations.answer_hint_27: Fletch Co. is the only diamond cutter that you haven't seen advertised. If you look at the map, you can eliminate the locations for diamond cutters that you have seen advertisements for. This leaves only one remaining diamond cutter at the intersection where Centre St. and Broome St. meet. This must be where Fletch Co. is located. To get there, press the dedicated Car button.
localizations.answer_hint_31: According to the newspaper, Don Salvatore is on the top floor of the building under construction. To reach him, determine the number of the top floor. As indicated by the elevator in the hotel, the ground floor is considered the first floor in this city, which means the top floor is the 15th floor.
localizations.answer_hint_36: You have seen this poster advertising this movie theater at the newsstand (76), which indicates it's in the heart of Little Italy. The only movie theater in the center of the map is the one at the intersection of Kenmare St. and Mott St. Press the dedicated Car button and travel to that location.
localizations.answer_hint_46: Use the conversations found on cards 3, 27, and 46 to retrace Tony's path on your map. Start at the intersection of Lafayette St. and Broome St., then proceed down to Grand St. Continue east along Grand St. until you reach the intersection with Centre Street. Next, head north along Centre St. to the intersection with Broome St. Finally, return back down Centre St. Tracing this route will create the shape of the number 4.
localizations.answer_hint_54: You were at the construction site (31) at 4:06 p.m. and arrived at the movie theater (20) 29 minutes later, which means you arrived at 4:35 p.m. Your meeting is scheduled to take place at the end of a movie (E). The only movie about to end is “Cuore Spezzato”, which, according to the schedule (56), started at 2:45 p.m. in auditorium 4. The newspaper indicates it runs for 2 hours, so it will end at 4:45 p.m., which is very soon. Use your ticket (36) to enter auditorium 4 (+62). 36+62=98
localizations.answer_hint_74: Your FBI badge is hidden on the back of the introduction card (22). You can show this badge (+22) to the policewoman (74). 74+22=96
localizations.answer_hint_96: Now that you've contacted your FBI colleagues using Machine 34, you've learned that Vittorio is staying at a luxury hotel. The newspaper describes the only luxury hotel in Little Italy as being next to a museum. According to the map, there is only one hotel next to a museum, located at the intersection of Elizabeth St. and Kenmare St. Press the dedicated Car button and proceed to that location.
localizations.answer_hint_98: Don Salvatore's contact has hidden a password within his message (E). If you look at the capital letters that start each sentence, it will spell out "PLUS ONE". Give this password to the contact in the auditorium by adding 1 to your current card (98): 1 + 98 = 99
localizations.answer_hint_16: If Tony is in the care of doctors, it means he is at the hospital. However, according to the newspaper, the hospital on Mott St. is not currently accepting new patients. Therefore, Tony is at the hospital on E. Houston St. Press the dedicated Car button and proceed to the intersection of E. Houston St. and Elizabeth St.
localizations.answer_hint_48: To get rid of your two assailants, you use your left hand (+60) to open your door (+6) to take out the biker on your left. Then, you swerve (+70) towards the truck (+5) on your right, causing the biker on your right to crash into it.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Place the flat head screwdriver (23) so that its head is lined up with the notch of the screw on the bomb's paneling (78). Make sure the angle is correct so the screwdriver head fits properly. This will reveal the number 1. Next, place the wrench (25) so that it grips the head of the bolt securing the other side of the panel (78), ensuring it fits tightly, revealing the number 9. Putting them together, you see the number 19.
localizations.answer_hint_87: The runaway informs you that the container you are looking for is "boxed away from the light", but is still close by. The container is hidden within the game box. Remove the insert, and you will see it on one of the inside edges of the box.
localizations.answer_hint_19: Place the blue wire (21) so that it connects the bomb's exposed blue wires (19), forming the number 9. Then place the red wrench (25) so that it connects the bomb's red wires (19), forming the number 3. Doing this will short out both circuts. The combined short circuits form the number 93.
localizations.answer_hint_83: The runaway is too far ahead of you. The best way to stop him is to throw your baseball bat (12) at his legs (+75) to make him fall. 12 + 75= 87
localizations.answer_hint_45: Show your FBI badge (+22) to the harbor guard (+61); the badge is visible above the introductory text. 22 + 61 = 83.
localizations.answer_hint_37: According to the jeweler (80), the fake diamonds were delivered yesterday at noon. Looking at the schedules of the deliverymen (2 and 7), the only deliveryman on duty yesterday (Thursday) at noon was deliveryman A. As you look at all his scheduled deliveries, they form a pattern in the shape of the number 3.
localizations.answer_hint_29: Don Salvatore is in danger. According to the newspaper, he is currently at a construction site on Prince St. The documents found in Vittorio's room indicate that this building is located on Bowery St. Press the dedicated Car button and head to the intersection of Prince St. and Bowery St.
localizations.answer_hint_55: After reviewing all the information you gathered from the conversation you overheard in the hotel's bar (44), you can conclude that the only floor with a luxury room (with golden handles) that has a room across the hallway is the 4th floor. On this floor, room 402 is occupied by the lady you overheard; room 403 is occupied by the bartender; room 401 is occupied by someone named Gina, and Luna Ricci occupies room 400. The key to room 405 is on the key panel, so it is unoccupied. Therefore, Vittorio must be in room 404. Press the door of room 404 on your device.
localizations.answer_hint_86: If you blow on your device and tilt it from left to right, you'll notice that the round stones do not meet the criteria listed on the Authentic Diamond Characteristics sheet (59): they do not sparkle but do fog up. Therefore, the round stones are the fakes and come from Stone & Sons. You have also seen a poster advertisement for Stone & Sons (72), indicating they are located on Lafayette St. The only diamond cutter on that road is at the intersection of Lafayette St. and Broome St. Press the dedicated Car button and head to this intersection.
localizations.answer_hint_33: The contact at the movie theater (99) told you, "We beat Boston." In the newspaper, you can find the results of New York's games, particularly the games played against Boston (BOS). To unlock the briefcase, enter the scores of the two games where New York (NYY) won against Boston (BOS): 3241
localizations.answer_hint_machine_34_part1: The number for the secure line changes daily, and is published under "Today's Classified Ads" in the newspaper. One ad in particular features oddly placed capital letters: F, B, and I. Enter the phone number listed in this ad (555-3855) into the machine.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_34_part2: The container's serial number consists of a series of numbers and letters. Use your device's keypad to provide this serial number to the FBI. Enter 84539821.
localizations.machine_55: From the other side of the door you hear someone say, "Room service sure is quick here!" just as the door opens.
localizations.phone_step_1: "There have been some changes within the Battaglia family? We need to verify that. Vittorio seems to have gone on a bit of a spending spree at a luxury hotel in Little Italy. You need to find him before he screws this whole operation up! Perhaps you can use it as a way to gain additional favor from the Don as well, get him in your pocket!"
localizations.phone_step_2: This letter alone isn't enough to nail Don Salvatore. You need to get to the delivery before they do. You head to the harbor.
localizations.phone_step_3: No dial tone? You must use the secure line, whose number changes daily.
localizations.phone_step_4: “Did you locate the shipment? Give us the container's serial number so we can issue a warrant for Don Salvatore's arrest immediately.”
localizations.phone_step_5: “We’ve sent a patrol after him! You'll have to apprehend him!”
localizations.car_error: Instead of just following him, you must retrace Tony's route to find out where he's going.
localizations.car_error_hospital: "This hospital isn't letting anyone in right now. Don't you keep up with the news?"
localizations.phone_nothing: There is currently nothing to do here.
localizations.machine_end_info_target: Patrol 11, Don Salvatore is at the intersection of {0} and {1}.
localizations.machine_end_info_block_1: Firemen are currently blocking the intersection of {0} and {1}.
localizations.machine_end_info_block_2: A car accident is currently blocking the intersection of {0} and {1}.
localizations.machine_end_info_block_3: An ambulance is currently blocking the intersection of {0} and {1}.
localizations.machine_end_info_block_4: Traffic is being blocked by an incident at the intersection of {0} and {1}.
localizations.machine_car_intro: Take the map from the glove compartment and select an intersection of two streets to reach your destination.
localizations.machine_end:
Due to the joint efforts of the New York police and the FBI, you have successfully apprehended Don Salvatore. Getting out of your car, you handcuff him.
The Mafia boss is stunned to see his criminal empire collapse before him in a single day. For your part, you feel a sense of relief as you can now put an end to this double life of deception. You look forward to your next investigation as you continue to root out the corruption that plagues New York.
